povzetek: RSS testni nacin: 72 clankov pobrano iz BBC, MarketWatch, CNBC, FT, Al Jazeera. Brez Gemini AI analize.

novice.naslov: Supermarkets urged to limit food prices by government
novice.povzetek: Any price caps would be voluntary apply to key groceries such as eggs, bread, and milk, the BBC understands.

novice.naslov: Petrol hits highest price since start of Iran war
novice.povzetek: The average price of unleaded has risen to 158.52p a litre, according to the RAC, who warn that it could rise further in the coming weeks.

novice.naslov: Swatch boss says crowds are 'good news' after watch launch sparks chaos
novice.povzetek: Nick Hayek Jr says the pocket watch launch saw "overcrowding like hell" at a small number of its UK stores.

novice.naslov: HS2 costs could top £100bn and trains will be slower than first planned
novice.povzetek: The new cost range and train speed are being announced as a "reset" of the delayed, over-budget and vastly scaled-back project is carried out.

novice.naslov: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
novice.povzetek: Most clothes are made in Asia, but new machines could bring some of that work back to the West.
The number of UK job vacancies also fell to its lowest level in five years as the initial impact of the Iran war on businesses starts to be seen.

novice.naslov: Son of Mango boss arrested over father's fatal fall from cliff
novice.povzetek: Isak, 71, died in December 2024 after falling from a ravine while walking in the Montserrat mountains near Barcelona.

novice.naslov: What's happening to UK petrol and diesel prices?
novice.povzetek: Motoring group RAC warns pump prices could keep rising if there is no resolution to the Iran war.
